summary: Review of fixes addressing sourcery-ai[bot] feedback on the CC-0038 HPA sub-reconciler. All four individual comments and both overall suggestions were addressed correctly: (1) implicit minReplicas default validation added to webhook, (2) normalizeMap helper added for nil-vs-empty map comparison in EnsureHPA, (3) test for nil-labels preservation added, (4) ownerReference typo fixed in docs. Additionally, apiResourceName helper centralizes the HPA/Deployment naming convention, and DeleteHPA was simplified to avoid the unnecessary Get roundtrip.

tests_checklist.item: All unit tests pass (deployment: 36/36, webhook autoscaling: 14/14, reconcile_hpa: 20/20)
Edge cases covered (implicit minReplicas equals maxReplicas boundary, nil labels preservation, delete absent HPA)
Error cases covered (ensure error propagated, delete error propagated)
New validation has both positive and negative test cases

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing EnsurePDB pattern for EnsureHPA structure
normalizeMap is appropriately scoped as a local function
apiResourceName centralizes naming convention to prevent drift

security_checklist.item: All user inputs validated (autoscaling bounds, utilization ranges)
Defense-in-depth webhook validation mirrors kubebuilder markers
No hardcoded secrets or sensitive data exposure

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
Changes are scoped to addressing external review feedback only
No scope creep beyond the four comments and two overall suggestions

dry_yagni_checklist.item: normalizeMap is minimal — only used where needed

fail_fast_checklist.item: Implicit minReplicas > maxReplicas rejected at webhook admission
Error message includes both maxReplicas and spec.replicas values

defensive_checklist.item: All autoscaling fields have defense-in-depth webhook checks
Implicit default path (minReplicas nil → spec.replicas) validated

suggested_improvements: PC3 (suggestion): EnsurePDB (deployment.go:191-194) uses raw DeepEqual on Labels/Annotations without the normalizeMap normalization that was added to EnsureHPA (deployment.go:273-274). Both functions perform identical metadata reconciliation, so the same nil-vs-empty map issue exists in EnsurePDB. Consider backporting the normalizeMap fix to EnsurePDB in a follow-up. Not flagged as blocking because EnsurePDB is unchanged code from CC-0037.

NPC1 (suggestion): apiResourceName() was introduced in reconcile_hpa.go to centralize the '{name}-api' naming convention, but reconcile_deployment.go still uses inline fmt.Sprintf('%s-api', keystone.Name) in 4 locations (buildKeystoneDeployment, buildPodDisruptionBudget, buildKeystoneService, reconcileDeployment). Consider migrating those to use apiResourceName() in a follow-up to fully realize the centralization benefit. Not flagged as blocking because reconcile_deployment.go is outside this diff's scope.
next_steps: Consider a follow-up PR to backport normalizeMap to EnsurePDB and migrate reconcile_deployment.go to use apiResourceName()
